message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "requirement": "Data Security and Confidentiality",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The contract lacks explicit clauses addressing data security measures and confidentiality obligations for the handling of sensitive information.",
      "evidence": [
        "The Phase Agreement will also have the following items attached thereto: The Functional Specifications which is a narrative explanation of the operation of the programs, containing Exhibits of all screen and reports.",
        "Developer shall provide and deliver to Company custom software in regards thereto as outlined in Clause 3."
      ],
      "remediation": "Include specific clauses that outline data security measures, confidentiality obligations, and the handling of sensitive information.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.5",
      "source_clause_id": "d5e929d7-99a3-489a-91ef-b7ed920bea0c",
      "source_excerpt": "The Phase Agreement will also have the following items attached thereto: The Functional Specifications which is a narrative explanation of the operation of the programs, containing Exhibits of all screen and reports.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Privacy Compliance",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "high",
      "explanation": "The contract does not mention compliance with applicable privacy laws or regulations, which is critical for the handling of personal data.",
      "evidence": [
        "Developer shall develop custom software which will modify, customize, amend, enhance or otherwise change the following pre-existing Developer software packages to fulfill the requirements of Company."
      ],
      "remediation": "Add a clause that ensures compliance with relevant privacy laws and regulations, including data protection rights.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "3.1",
      "source_clause_id": "2a17cc1f-67e3-4401-96de-60bbd671b693",
      "source_excerpt": "Developer shall develop custom software which will modify, customize, amend, enhance or otherwise change the following pre-existing Developer software packages to fulfill the requirements of Company: [Describe]",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Audit Rights",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "There are no provisions in the contract that grant the Company audit rights to ensure compliance with the terms of the agreement.",
      "evidence": [
        "Upon delivery, Company shall conduct the acceptance test that was created by the parties."
      ],
      "remediation": "Include a clause that grants the Company the right to audit the Developer's compliance with the contract terms and conditions.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.10",
      "source_clause_id": "6b5d6aad-b79b-42b2-b348-0977f0034c3c",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon delivery, Company shall conduct the acceptance test that was created by the parties.",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "requirement": "Data Retention",
      "status": "fail",
      "severity": "medium",
      "explanation": "The contract does not specify data retention policies for the data processed or generated during the software development.",
      "evidence": [
        "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement."
      ],
      "remediation": "Add a clause that defines data retention periods and responsibilities for both parties regarding data management post-project.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    }
  ]
}
